title: Faulty Terminal
description: OGL WebGL CRT terminal background with scanlines, barrel distortion, chromatic aberration, film grain, and mouse-reactive glitch effects, creating a retro broken-screen aesthetic.
prompt_text:
# Faulty Terminal

OGL WebGL CRT terminal background with scanlines, barrel distortion, chromatic aberration, film grain, and mouse-reactive glitch effects, creating a retro broken-screen aesthetic.

## Use when
- Setting a broken-screen, hacker aesthetic on a dark landing page.
- Using as 404 page background with atmospheric glitch distortion.
- Creating a retro cyber visual break between page sections.

## Stack
- Framework: react
- Libraries: ogl

## Install
```bash
npm install ogl
```

## Component — faulty-terminal.tsx
```tsx
// Source: animations_008.md
// Export: FaultyTerminal (default)
// Props: className, style
// Uses OGL Renderer, Program, Mesh, Triangle, Vec2
// Full GLSL fragment shader with: CRT barrel distortion, scanlines,
//   chromatic aberration, Perlin noise grain, mouse-reactive glitch offsets
// See full source in raw/animations_008.md
```

## Notes
- Requires OGL (~100 KB). Lazy-load for performance.
- Mouse position is tracked globally and passed to the shader as a uniform.
